identity.variant: Oli Lite / Oli EDU / Oli Super and additional official spec column; generic record is not assigned one package
identity.notes: LimX公式ページはOliシリーズの複数variantを明記し、仕様表も高さ・重量・DoF・稼働時間・荷重・算力を構成別に掲載。単一variantの値へ統合していない。

positioningFacts.statement: LimX positions Oli as a full-size general-purpose humanoid robot with independent motion-control and perception compute
Oli official overview lists scientific research and development, entertainment and performance, exhibition and event guidance, equipment inspection, industrial operations and property management
Oli supports full Python development, modular SDK, upper/lower-level APIs, URDF, code examples and major simulators

mobility.rawValue: Full-size humanoid robot; official high-level control supports humanoid walking, mobile operation, stationary operation and remote operation
mobility.condition: official page supports walking but generic mobility enum is not fixed for all variants
mobility.evidenceSummary: 歩行・人形機体は確認できるが、シリーズ代表variantを選んでいない。

heightCm.rawValue: 165cm for multiple Oli columns; 175cm in another official spec column
heightCm.evidenceSummary: 公式仕様表に165cmと175cmがあり、単一値を選択していない。

weightKg.rawValue: ≤55kg for multiple Oli columns; ≤60kg in another official spec column, battery included
weightKg.evidenceSummary: 電池込み重量が≤55kg／≤60kgでvariant依存。

speedMps.evidenceSummary: 最大移動速度5km/hをm/sへ換算。

dof.rawValue: Active DoF total 31 for Lite/EDU columns, 33 for Super column and 43 in another official spec column; single arm 7, single leg 6, waist 3, neck 2
dof.condition: official configuration-dependent total; end-effector DoF may differ
dof.evidenceSummary: 公式表の31／33／43 DoFとscope別内訳。

payloadKg.rawValue: Official maximum single-arm load values are retained in loadRatings and not copied to scalar payloadKg
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 片腕荷重をscalarへ流用していない。

runtimeMin.rawValue: Battery life about 2h in multiple Oli columns; about 1.5h in Super/additional column
runtimeMin.condition: runtime differs by configuration and official condition is approximate
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 構成別の約2時間／約1.5時間を分離。

batteryCapacityWh.rawValue: 9,500mAh battery capacity; no battery voltage is published for Wh conversion
batteryCapacityWh.condition: official capacity is Ah-based, so Wh cannot be derived without voltage
batteryCapacityWh.evidenceSummary: 9500mAhは確認したがWh換算していない。

chargeTimeMin.rawValue: Charger output 58.8V 10A is published, but charging duration is not
chargeTimeMin.condition: charger output is not charge time
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 充電器出力のみで充電時間は非公開。

batterySystem.condition: battery chemistry and voltage of the battery itself are not stated
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 交換式モジュールと公式容量・充電器表記。

controlMethod.rawValue: Remote controller, handheld emergency stop, voice-based control and high/low-level motion APIs
controlMethod.normalizedValue: remote control / voice control / motion APIs
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: リモコン、音声、API操作を確認。

sdk.rawValue: Full Python development, modular SDK, upper/lower-level APIs, URDF, code examples, Isaac Sim, MuJoCo and Gazebo support
sdk.normalizedValue: LimX modular SDK / Python / upper-lower APIs
sdk.evidenceSummary: 公式ページのSDK、Python、API、Sim2Real資料を確認。

computePlatform.rawValue: Motion control RK3588/8G/64G or RK3588/16G/256G; perception absent or Orin NX 157TOPS/16G/1T or 2T; optional computing backpack AGX Orin 64GB/275TOPS
computePlatform.condition: official compute stack differs by package
computePlatform.evidenceSummary: RK3588・Orin NX・AGX Orinの構成差を確認。

ipRating.rawValue: No Oli IP ingress-protection rating found on reviewed official product, spec, news and support pages
ipRating.condition: quick-swap or general-purpose wording is not an IP rating
ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: No whole-robot operating-temperature range found on reviewed Oli official product, spec, news and support pages
operatingTemperature.condition: remote-controller temperature is not robot operating temperature
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 機体動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: Handheld emergency stop is published, but no named Oli safety standard or certification number found
safetyStandard.condition: emergency stop function is not a compliance standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: E-stopは確認したが規格名・認証番号はない。

loadRatings.condition: Official maximum single-arm load for multiple Oli columns; exact package mapping is not fully exposed in extracted table
Official maximum single-arm load for another Oli specification column; exact variant name is not fully exposed in extracted table

officialUseCases.reason: 公式Oliページが科学研究・開発を明示。
展示・イベント案内を既存受付・案内UseCaseへ接続。
設備検査を既存の視覚検査UseCaseへ接続。
公式の産業オペレーション表現を工場作業支援へ接続。

usageExamples.title: Full-Size Humanoid Oli | Fully Autonomous Tennis Ball Picks Up & Tosses
usageExamples.summary: LimX公式ニュースがOliの自律的なテニスボール拾い上げ・投げ動作を紹介する製品デモ。導入・量産配備ではなくdemonstrationとして記録した。

marketAvailability.rawValue: Oli has an official Buy Now/order-consultation route and a current multi-variant specification page; public stock, shipment terms and production package status are not published
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 公式購入・問い合わせ導線はあるが、在庫と出荷条件は非公開。

japanAvailability.rawValue: Order form includes Japan as a country/phone option, but no Japan sales, shipping or local fulfillment statement is published
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本選択肢は確認したが日本入手可能とは断定していない。

distributorJapan.rawValue: No domestic authorized distributor identified on reviewed LimX official pages
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.rawValue: Official order consultation, service/support pages, manuals and developer documentation are public; Japan repair SLA and field-service terms are not published
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 公式サポート導線はあるが国内支援条件は非公開。

sourceCandidates.reason: 公式Buy Now/Contact Salesを確認したがOli公開価格はない。
Oli Lite/EDU/Super等の構成別仕様表を確認した。

conflicts: Oli公式仕様表は高さ165/175cm、重量≤55/≤60kg、DoF31/33/43、稼働約2/約1.5時間、片腕最大荷重3/5kg、計算基盤が構成依存。
公式ページは製品構成が継続的に更新されると注意しているため、generic recordを代表variantへ固定していない。
humanReviewRequired: Oli Lite、EDU、Super等のどのvariantを公開Robotレコードの代表とするか決定する。
公開仕様表の4列目variant名と片腕5kg・175cm・43DoF・60kgの対応をLimX公式へ確認する。
日本向け販売・保守条件とOliの実導入事例を公式窓口で確認する。

identity.notes: Luna公式製品ページ、公式仕様表、公式製品発表を確認。Oli/TRONの値を流用していない。

positioningFacts.statement: LimX positions Luna as a full-size interactive humanoid robot for commercial spaces and consumer engagement
Official Luna use environments include shopping malls, museums, theme parks and live stages
Luna provides multimodal interaction, video-to-motion, AI task editor and synchronized control for 200+ units

mobility.rawValue: Full-size interactive humanoid with leg DoF and maximum walking speed
mobility.condition: walking and leg structure are explicit; official page does not use a single mobility enum
mobility.evidenceSummary: 脚部・walkingは確認できるが、二足enumの公式明示は確認できない。

speedMps.condition: official maximum walking speed converted from 5km/h

dof.rawValue: 27 active DoF; leg 6, arm 5, waist 3, neck 2
dof.condition: active whole-body total; end-effector option is separate

payloadKg.rawValue: 3kg max arm payload is retained in loadRatings and not copied to scalar payloadKg
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 片腕最大荷重をscalarへ流用していない。

runtimeMin.condition: official laboratory specification; actual performance may vary

batteryCapacityWh.rawValue: 10,000mAh battery capacity; battery voltage is not provided for Wh conversion
batteryCapacityWh.condition: official capacity is mAh, not Wh

batterySystem.rawValue: Two slide-out battery modules; direct charging or battery swapping; charger output 58.8V 10A
batterySystem.normalizedValue: slide-out dual battery / direct charging or swapping
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 二つの引出式電池、直接充電・交換、充電器出力を確認。

controlMethod.rawValue: Remote controller and tablet; LimX Studio supports video imitation, manual teaching, choreography, intelligent tasks and group control
controlMethod.condition: official Luna specification and software description
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: リモコン・タブレット・Studio機能。

sdk.rawValue: LimX Studio and LimX UP are documented as control/content platforms, but no Luna SDK/API package is named in reviewed official pages
sdk.condition: do not relabel a content platform as SDK
sdk.evidenceSummary: Luna固有のSDK/API名は確認できない。

computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 動作制御・知覚のRK3588構成。

ipRating.rawValue: No Luna IP ingress-protection rating found on reviewed official product, spec and news pages
ipRating.condition: multi-layer safety wording is not IP rating
ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: No whole-robot operating-temperature range found on reviewed Luna official product, spec and news pages
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: Active fall mitigation, external force sensing, hardware E-stop and safe action override are published; no named safety standard/certification found
safetyStandard.condition: functional safety architecture is not a named compliance standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全機能は確認したが規格名・認証番号はない。

loadRatings.condition: Official Max Arm Payload; exact load condition beyond arm scope is not stated

officialUseCases.officialExpression: commercial spaces, multimodal interaction, audience engagement
officialUseCases.reason: 公式発表が商業空間での顧客体験・インタラクションを明示。

useCaseGaps: USE_CASE_GAP limx-luna "shopping malls / museums / theme parks / live stages" https://www.limxdynamics.com/en/products/luna

marketAvailability.rawValue: Luna has an official Buy Now/order-consultation route and current product/spec pages; public stock, shipment terms and production package status are not published
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 購入相談導線はあるが在庫・出荷条件は非公開。

japanAvailability.rawValue: Order form includes Japan as a country/phone option, but no Japan sales, shipping or local fulfillment statement is published
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本選択肢は確認したが国内入手可能とは断定していない。

distributorJapan.rawValue: No domestic authorized distributor identified on reviewed LimX official pages
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.rawValue: Official order consultation and product/support documentation are public; Japan repair SLA and field-service terms are not published
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 公式問い合わせはあるが国内サポート条件は非公開。

sourceCandidates.reason: 公式Buy Now/Contact Salesを確認したがLuna公開価格はない。
公式Luna発表は製品発表であり導入事例には数えていない。

conflicts: Luna公式発表は27 DoF、仕様表も27 active DoFで一致する。
公式製品発表・仕様表は性能値を掲載するが、実際の商用導入事例は確認できなかった。
humanReviewRequired: Lunaの日本向け販売・保守条件と実際の商業空間導入事例を公式窓口で確認する。
